inputs.label: Number of Change Orders
inputs.businessContext: Total number of change orders during the project. Based on PMBOK and earned value management standards.

inputs.label: Average Cost per Change Order
inputs.businessContext: Direct cost including labor, materials, and overhead. Referenced from industry benchmarks (e.g., PMI).

inputs.label: Schedule Delay per Change Order
inputs.businessContext: Average delay caused by each change order. Based on lean construction and project management data.

inputs.label: Daily Penalty Rate
inputs.businessContext: Contractual penalty per day of delay. Common in construction contracts.

inputs.label: Rework Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Hourly cost of labor for rework. Based on industry wage surveys.

inputs.label: Rework Hours per Change Order
inputs.businessContext: Average labor hours required for rework per change order. Derived from Six Sigma DMAIC studies.

inputs.label: Material Waste Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of material wasted due to changes. Lean manufacturing waste reduction metrics.

inputs.label: Total Material Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total material budget for the project. Standard cost accounting.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of direct costs allocated to overhead. Based on activity-based costing (ABC).

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Used for risk-adjusted outputs. Common in Monte Carlo simulations.

thresholds.totalImpact: if totalImpact > 0.1 * totalMaterialCost then 'High impact: change order costs exceed 10% of material budget'
thresholds.scheduleDelay: if scheduleDelayPerChangeOrder * changeOrderCount > 30 then 'Critical: total delay exceeds 30 days'

hiddenLossDrivers: if scheduleDelayPerChangeOrder * changeOrderCount > 30 then 'Excessive schedule delay'
suggestedActions: Implement change control board to reduce change order count
Standardize processes to minimize rework hours
Negotiate lower penalty rates in contracts
Adopt lean inventory to reduce material waste
